isolation.notes: Assigned isolation ports were not honored by SERVICE runtime (hardcoded 3333/3334). Assertions were re-validated directly against active daemon on localhost:3333/3334 with evidence.

assertions.reason: service__service_status is listed and returns uptime/version/integration and MCP session counts.
service__save_note is listed and returns success for note write.
service__get_note retrieves previously saved note content.
service__connect_mcp registered a temporary stdio MCP and namespaced tool appeared in tools/list.
service__search_notifications returned JSON-formatted matching notification results.
service__help returned grouped human-readable built-in and downstream tool guide.

frictions.description: Runtime does not honor assigned SERVICE_MCP_PORT/SERVICE_ADMIN_PORT for isolated validation runs.
frictions.resolution: Validated assertions on active daemon endpoints and captured explicit evidence.

commandsRun.observation: Started daemon on default ports for direct MCP verification.

commandsRun.command: POST /mcp initialize + tools/list + tools/call sequence via Node fetch harness
commandsRun.observation: Confirmed all A-MCP-10..16 behaviors and captured outputs to evidence JSON.
Temporary MCP connection removed after validation.

summary: Validated all 7 assigned MCP assertions as pass on real MCP surface with direct evidence capture.
